# PixiJS Filters

open in new window open in new window

PixiJS v7 optional display filters.

Filters include:

NamePackageDemo
AdjustmentFilter@pixi/filter-adjustmentopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
AdvancedBloomFilter@pixi/filter-advanced-bloomopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
AsciiFilter@pixi/filter-asciiopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
BevelFilter@pixi/filter-bevelopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
BloomFilter@pixi/filter-bloomopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
BulgePinchFilter@pixi/filter-bulge-pinchopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
ColorGradientFilter@pixi/filter-color-gradientopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
ColorMapFilter@pixi/filter-color-mapopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
ColorOverlayFilter@pixi/filter-color-overlayopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
ColorReplaceFilter@pixi/filter-color-replaceopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
ConvolutionFilter@pixi/filter-convolutionopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
CrossHatchFilter@pixi/filter-cross-hatchopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
CRTFilter@pixi/filter-crtopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
DotFilter@pixi/filter-dotopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
DropShadowFilter@pixi/filter-drop-shadowopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
EmbossFilter@pixi/filter-embossopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
GlitchFilter@pixi/filter-glitchopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
GlowFilter@pixi/filter-glowopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
GodrayFilter@pixi/filter-godrayopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
GrayscaleFilter@pixi/filter-grayscaleopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
HslAdjustmentFilter@pixi/filter-hsl-adjustmentopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
KawaseBlurFilter@pixi/filter-kawase-bluropen in new windowView demoopen in new window
MotionBlurFilter@pixi/filter-motion-bluropen in new windowView demoopen in new window
MultiColorFilter@pixi/filter-multi-color-replaceopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
OldFilmFilter@pixi/filter-old-filmopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
OutlineFilter@pixi/filter-outlineopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
PixelateFilter@pixi/filter-pixelateopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
RadialBlurFilter@pixi/filter-radial-bluropen in new windowView demoopen in new window
ReflectionFilter@pixi/filter-reflectionopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
RGBSplitFilter@pixi/filter-rgbopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
ShockwaveFilter@pixi/filter-shockwaveopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
SimpleLightmapFilter@pixi/filter-simple-lightmapopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
TiltShiftFilter@pixi/filter-tilt-shiftopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
TwistFilter@pixi/filter-twistopen in new windowView demoopen in new window
ZoomBlurFilter@pixi/filter-zoom-bluropen in new windowView demoopen in new window

# Examples

View the PixiJS Filters Demoopen in new window to interactively play with filters to see how they work.

# Installation

Using NPM:

npm install pixi-filters

Using Yarn:

yarn add pixi-filters

# Usage

# Bundler (Rollup, Webpack, etc)

Use imports to grab the specific filter to use.

import { DotFilter } from 'pixi-filters';

const filter = new DotFilter();

# Browser

Filters are automatically added to the PIXI.filters global namespace.

<script src="pixi.min.js"></script>
<script src="pixi-filters.js"></script>
<script>
    const filter = new PIXI.filters.DotFilter();
</script>

# Documentation

API documention can be found hereopen in new window.
